entry.title: Re: How to call a trigger api automation from sap mobile...
entry.content:
I am assuming that the service screenshot is the /Capacitacion2/Services/DestinationBTP.service referenced in the SendRequest action.  Are you specifying the body elements in your Send Request action?

Click the Body[0] line and use the add button to add parameters to the body of your Send Request action.

entry.title: Re: Error while consuming Rest API 'the startDate should...
entry.content: @Ryan-Crosby thanks for your time , i will .

entry.title: Re: Recipient Determination in Workflow Rules in SAP Cloud for Customer
entry.content:
Hello,

i am trying to use this Recipient Determination for a workflow on a custom business object. I am not able to retrieve the custom business object by the UUID, though. "Parameter type 'UUID' is not valid". Did i misconfigure my custom bo or is it not possible to retrieve custom bos by UUIDs ? Since the UUID is all i got from this Enhancement. I verified by OData, that i am able to alter BO instances of the Custom BO with the ObjectID, which i get from the InputData.TriggerBOUUID.

I would greatly appreciate an answer.

With kind regards

Lars Wiete

entry.title: Talent Intelligence Hub and SAP SuccessFactors Learning
entry.content:
Over the last few releases, SAP SuccessFactors has advanced into a Talent Intelligence Platform, helping organisations move towards a skills-based organisation by offering an AI-based skills management and recommendation solution. However, in my conversations with customers, a common misconception has emerged. Many users of other Talent Intelligence Platforms, or those using SAP SuccessFactors Learning as the only module within SuccessFactors, have expressed that they need to see the necessity of integrating Talent Intelligence within SAP SuccessFactors. This belief, however, is based on a misunderstanding of the platform's capabilities and the substantial benefits it offers.

This blog will only look at the latter case – customers using SAP SuccessFactors Learning only. SAP SuccessFactors Learning has an established track record and strength in managing the learning process for organisations with robust compliance and job-related learning needs. As a result, several Workday and Oracle customers continue to use SAP SuccessFactors as their learning platform. This is even more prevalent in the Pharma and Life Sciences industry, where the learning systems need to be validated as per the GxP processes.

Skills usually belong in the core HR/Talent platform; for organisations that only use the learning module in SuccessFactors, this belongs in other HR or Talent systems, and skills should be managed there. However, to drive an actual skills-based experience – which covers skill maintenance, development, and acquisition – it is vital to link your learning offering to skills.

Understanding Talent Intelligence Hub

 

Before we delve deeper, let's understand what Talent Intelligence Hub is and its significance. The Talent Intelligence Hub is a transformative component of SAP SuccessFactors, designed to revolutionise how organisations manage and develop talent. It comprises three key elements:

Attribute Library: This serves as the organisation's comprehensive skill library, a dynamic repository of skills that can be tailored to specific organisational needs. It is the foundation upon which skills management and development are built.

Talent Intelligent Foundation: The Talent Intelligence Hub's foundation element, the skills ontology, is at the heart of its operation. This sophisticated AI-driven engine powers SAP SuccessFactors' inference and recommendation capabilities. It analyses skills data to provide insightful recommendations for skill development and alignment across the organisation.

Growth Portfolio: This component represents the user's personal skill profile. It tracks skill development and acquisition, providing a personalised roadmap for growth. Importantly, this is permission-driven, so you can hide this from users to minimise confusion about where skills are managed, ensuring a focus on development rather than administration.

The integration of these components within SAP SuccessFactors Learning enables a seamless, integrated learning experience that supports compliance and job-related training and fosters continuous skill development and growth. For a complete understanding, additional insights can be explored in detailed blogs and community discussions provided by SAP experts like @RinkyKarthik. 

See some links below

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-blogs-by-sap/talent-intelligence-hub-2024-updates-and-behind-the-scenes/ba-p/13587670

Previous Blogs

https://blogs.sap.com/2023/07/04/maximize-skills-growth-with-the-new-integrated-learning-experience-in-sap-successfactors/

https://blogs.sap.com/2023/07/06/enabling-your-workforce-for-the-future-with-the-new-integrated-learning-experience/?preview_id=1797196

Integrating Talent Intelligence: The Benefits

Integrating Talent Intelligence with SAP SuccessFactors Learning offers a unified approach to skills management and learning, applicable to organisations with existing skill libraries and those starting anew. Here's how it enhances the learning experience:

Skill Library Integration

SAP SuccessFactors can import data from various platforms through productised integrations in the Integration Center. This flexibility supports two main actions:

- Attribute Import: Import the skill library from the source system to SAP SuccessFactors. For organisations with an existing skill library, this can be set to a daily import, ensuring any new skills in the source data are promptly reflected in SuccessFactors.

- Portfolio Import: Import the user's skill profile from master skill platforms. This tool enriches the learning recommendations engine within SuccessFactors with personalised content suggestions.

Once imported, the "Attribute Synchronization" process automatically integrates these attributes into SAP SuccessFactors Learning, maintaining a seamless skills database.

For organisations without a pre-existing skill management framework, the journey begins with setting up a foundational structure:

- Setup Job Profile Builder: A simplified setup focusing on essential information, possibly just the job title, can lay the groundwork for skill-based learning.

- Setup Skills Library: Options include utilising SAP SuccessFactors Skillsplex Library, leveraging content vendors like LinkedIn Learning or Coursera, or creating an organisation-specific library with the help of tools developed by TalenTeam. The TalenTeam extension approach, powered by AI, customises the skill library to the organisation's unique profile.

 Learning Content and Skills Linking

Linking learning content with skills allows users to search for content by skills and enables the recommendation engine to suggest the most relevant content based on the user's skill profile. Key features to consider are:

- Rating System: Admins can enable options like "Provide rating" for assessments, allowing the automatic update of the Growth Portfolio with new ratings. This ensures a dynamic feedback loop where skill assessments directly influence learning recommendations.

- Content Tagging with Skills: Addressing the challenge of maintaining a vast content volume, TalenTeam has developed an accelerator that efficiently maps learning content to the skills library. This automation keeps the skill data continuously updated, minimising the administrative burden.

Continuous Update and Maintenance

The integrated approach allows for an enhanced, more integrated learning experience for employees across systems without the cumbersome task of maintaining data in multiple platforms. For organisations starting without a skill management system, the detailed setup introduces a skill-based learning experience that can evolve and align with broader organisational skill strategies as they develop.

Once these are set, users can start to benefit from the following features

· Skill-based recommendations – users will start to get course recommendations based on the skill profile based on the job profile.

· Search for content by skills – SAP SuccessFactors learning search now includes skills as a search filter and parameter for a more targeted search.

· Skill Attainment – Some courses can provide a skill rating, which can be shown on the Growth Portfolio. Users can also add additional skills to that screen, such as interest skills.

 

This setup allows employees an enhanced skill-based learning experience. Once HR has implemented the skills tool, it can easily be tailored in the future to align with the organisation's skill approach.

Your Pathway to a Skills-Based Organisation

As we have explored, integrating Talent Intelligence within SAP SuccessFactors Learning is not just necessary; it's a game changer for organisations aiming to thrive in the modern workforce landscape. The Talent Intelligence Hub offers a robust suite of tools to enhance the learning experience, making it more relevant, personalised, and aligned with organisational goals.

However, understanding and implementing these advancements can seem daunting. That's where the opportunity for dialogue comes in. We invite you to start a conversation with us on how we can accelerate your journey to becoming a skills-based organisation. Whether you're interested in exploring the SAP SuccessFactors Talent Intelligence Hub or leveraging the TalenTeam extension to speed up the process, our team is ready to assist.

This is your moment to transform learning and skills management within your organisation to meet compliance needs and foster continuous growth and development. Let's embark on this journey together, shaping a learning ecosystem that meets today's demands and anticipates tomorrow's challenges. Your organisation's path to a more skilled, adaptable, and innovative workforce starts now.

entry.title: Re: SAC : How to Create calculated dimension based on live data
entry.content: @N1kh1l Thanks for the reply that helped!

entry.title: Re: How to create a value help for custom and released domain fixed values?
entry.content:
Hi Pallava,

you don't have to and you must not replace anything in the coding.

The name of the domain is specified in the defintion of the value help.

localConstant: 'BEL_API_RETCODE', usage: #FILTER

This value is then transferred to the implementation in the query implementation class. 

It is in the defintion of the value help where you would have to specify the name of the domain

for you 

localConstant: 'Z_GENDER' , usage :  #FILTER

Kind regards,   

Andre

Kind regards,

Andre

entry.title: Re: Is there any workaround to create calculated Dimensions in SAC story based on Live Model
entry.content: @DebjitSingha Thanks for detailed explanation. It's very helpful information regarding the limitation of SAP Analytics Cloud live connections for Calculated Dimensions.

entry.title: Re: SAP BI Platform CMS extracts
entry.content: Thanks, Dell. Awaiting your reply.

entry.title: Re: IAS is mandatory for customers with Microsoft Azure SSO login
entry.content: You will need to elaborate. IAS works very well with Microsoft Azure (Entra ID) as the Corporate Identity Provider. IAS is not mandatory for Azure, but IAS will be mandatory for all SF instances by June 2025 (info as of feb 2024)

entry.title: Re: Some employees are not being synced to IAS/IPS from S...
entry.content:
I am also encountering the same issue for (as far as we know) a singular user at a brand new IAS/IPS/SF instance. We did run check tool according to "3396997 - [H2 2023] User Account management check tool enhancement" that helped us determine and fix a few issues with users missing User Account info and Login Name missing in SF. The user in question still did not sync over even after "fixing" some data in SF though. Nor does it throw an error in IPS at all.

If we find a solution I'll try to share it with you, we are probably going to open an SAP ticket to help.

entry.title: How to call or use valuemapping in SAP CPI MAG
entry.content:
How to call or use valuemapping in SAP MAG (Mapping guidelines) from B2B of SAP Integration suits.

We can easily call value mapping from SAP CPI iflow. But not able to call directly or create a value mapping in MAG mapping of the B2B.

Yes there is function Code Value mapping  - It is mainly for source to target field.

But we have to use value mapping, other fields and then we are creating target value.

entry.title: Re: A new approach for replicating tables across different SAP HANA systems
entry.content:
Hi,

Am replicating data from Hana 2.0 sps6 to SAP datasphere using the SDA connection option in Datasphere (no DP Agent but only Cloud connector). Is this replication done via log replication like with Hana cloud as a target? 

Thanks

-ravi

entry.title: XML no caen en la ruta parametrizada en SAP B1
entry.content:
Saludos Expertos. 

Estoy en la versión de SAP B1 10 2308, tengo el detalle de que cuando se timbran facturas el xml no cae en las rutas designadas, ya revise permisos, ya cambia varias veces las rutas, las he puesto con barras, las he puesto de varias formas pero no caen en automatico:

la he puesto asi C:\XML

tambien asi \\Alg-win-42\XML 

Si le doy exportar documento electronico en la factura si me lo exporta pero necesito que caigan en automatico. 

Espero alguien pueda apoyarme por favor, o guiarme de que podria yo intentar hacer para resolver este problema.

entry.title: Re: Get total price of the product based on attribute selection

entry.title: Re: What’s New for SAP Build Apps – Mobile Authentication
entry.content: Is the passcode mandatory? Users have already gained access to the device via PIN codes or biometrics?

entry.title: Re: Material Determination in SO
entry.content:
Does Material determination/Product selection or aATP based Product substitution support one-to-many substitutions?

i.e.

If I have Product A, can we configure it in a way to substitute product A with product B, C and D creating new line items in the sales order based on stock availability of each material? 

e g.

If product A in plant 1 is requested for 100 quantity, but no stock is available, but there's 30 of product B in plant 1, 20 of product C in plant 2 and 50 of product D in plant 3 are available, then the one line item should get replaced as three line items in the sales order one line item for each of products B, C and D.

Is this achievable through standard configuration?

Another follow up question would be can we introduce custom logic somewhere to determine the ranking of the different substitute products for doing the substitutions e.g say based on batch characteristic?

Any clues appreciated. 

Regards,

Kartefact

entry.title: Error while deploying CDS based services on on premise HANA system.
entry.content:
Hi Everyone

We are trying to deploy a project with db module having a HANA calculation view which further being consumed to create a cds based service using srv node js module. While it is working when we build and test locally, the deployment is failing with below error. Can anyone please guide me in fixing the issue? Please find the package.json (project level and srv module level) and MTA.yaml files in the attachments

/hana/shared/<SID>/xs/app_working/<SYSTEM ALIAS>/executionroot/8db36740-9455-4ff1-aee3-b9c51994fd5f/startCommand: line 8: exec: /hana/shared/<SID>/xs/app_working/<SYSTEM_ALIAS>/executionroot/8db36740-9455-4ff1-aee3-b9c51994fd5f/app/node_modules/.bin/cds-serve: cannot execute: Permission denied

Thanks in advance

Best Regards
Srujan

entry.title: Re: Manually add New Dimension Member - Sap Analytic Cloud
entry.content:
@daniel_weisblut 

Yes you can create/update/delete master data of a dimension using scripting from story. 

Follow the below blog, it covers the detail of how to do that.

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/a-scripting-guide-for-master-data-crud-operations-in-sap-analytics-cloud/ba-p/13571806

 

Br.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SLT Réplication Server for Central Finance (cFiN) scenarios – Parallelization of Access Plan cal
entry.content:
Hi abhishek,

There is better way to put parallelization by using below formula using NUMREC option in the table IUUC_PRECALC_OBJ.
As per my experience and best practice :
NUMREC -> total record / (number of parallel job) * 2

Example :
CE11000 -> Total records - 2,269,827,878

NUMREC= 2,269,827,878/8*2 = 141,864,242.375 = 150,000,000

Reference note : 2581084

entry.title: ABAP Syntax for updating stack internal table value at enhancement
entry.content:
Hello,

I have requirement that can not be fulfilled using available parameters at enhancement point say BADI. I have to append and delete lines of a internal table which available in another program at stack. 

We can fetch structure and variables using syntax - assign <variable/structure> to field-symbol. So, is there anyway to append lines or delete lines of internal table from stack program?

Thanks in advance

Mohil

entry.title: How can we export user list in SAP system with lock user or without lock user
entry.content:
How can we export user list in SAP system with lock user or without lock user

  

      Dear readers, this blog is useful for beginner as a Basis Consultant. We have learned about how to extract or export user list with lock user or without lock user.

Lets start…….

Go to  SUIM T-code ……. < SUIM >  

 

Open User hierarchical tree….

 

Open User by complex Selection Criteria.

 

Click on clock like button

 

  Execution button.

 

We can Search Single user by user id or we can search all users by typing ( * ) in user field.

Then execute…..

 

 

Here it is this is by default search we got all user list which are locked and active users in system.

Now , we want only that user that all Not locked only active users. Go back one screen….

 

There are Selection by locks field we can search by the criteria that we want…..

 

 

 

Now we can export this user list in local drive..

 

Goto :  List /Export/Spreadsheet

 

Download excel file in local drive selecting  path of your local drive…

Now we want user list with all parameters with (e.g. department, designation, etc.)

 

On the top of the screen left side we have

 

 this icon click on it.

 

Now , We move that information we want by using lift side arrow.

And then again export list of user that you want…..

 

Thank You…………..

entry.title: purchaser name
entry.content:
hi friends

Does anyone know where this field is read from?

Many thanks

mahsa

entry.title: Re: ABAP Syntax for updating stack internal table value at enhancement
entry.content: As you ask a very general question, let me answer very generally: how to do it depends on the scope of the variable, whether it's global, an attribute of a class (possibly via interface), private, protected, public and also read-only. Anyway you can access any of them, at worst by implementing an implicit enhancement point in the program of the variable (provided that the concerned program is not protected against enhancements)

entry.title: Re: How can we export user list in SAP system with lock user or without lock user
entry.content: That's incorrect: here, you are posting a question about SAP Web sites, not a blog post. Instead go to https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/bg-p/technology-blog-members and click "Create a Blog".

yes you can activate Azure(Entra) SSO via SAP IAS as Corporate Identity provider.  When User logins to SAP Application which will be redirected to Azure login page.

entry.title: SAP Datasphere: "演算子と値"を用いた複雑なデータアクセス制御の作成
entry.content:
はじめに

このブログでは、SAP Datasphere の"演算子と値"を用いた複雑なデータアクセス制御について解説します。
※当ブログは、こちらのブログを一通り確認された方が対象となります。

 

機能概要

SAP Datasphere のデータアクセス制御は、基本的にスペース単位でオブジェクト（テーブルやビュー）を管理し、そのオブジェクトにアクセス可能なユーザをスペースに追加することで管理しますが、同じスペース内でもデータ内容に応じてユーザのアクセス制御を行いたいケースがあると思います。
そういった場合に、権限テーブルを用意することでログインしたユーザに応じて参照できるデータを定義し、行レベルできめ細やかなアクセス制御を行うことが可能です。

しかしながら、行レベルのアクセス制御で対応できないような複雑な条件や、複数条件を必要とするアクセス制御が必要なケースもあるかと思います。そのような場合でも、SAP Datasphere では演算子や値の組合せを用いて複雑なデータアクセス制御を作成することが可能です。

 

ユースケース

ユースケースとして、例えば以下のようなケースが考えられます。

  • 兼務ユーザで複数部署の参照権限を持たせたい
  • 異動により所属変更後も在籍していた年月までの旧部署データを参照できるようにしたい
  • 特定の文字列を含む関連データのみ例外的に参照できるようにしたい
  • 特権ユーザとしてすべてのデータを参照できるようにしたい

上記のような複雑なアクセス制御を行いたい場合でも、ANDとOR条件の組合せを用いてデータアクセス制御を作成することが可能です。また、「特定の文字列を含むデータ」のようなあいまい条件でデータアクセス制御を作成することも可能です。対象ユーザに応じて細かなアクセス制御をかけることができる一方、特定ユーザには例外的に全てのレコードを参照できる権限を付与する、といった使い方もできます。

次の章では、具体的なデータアクセス制御の作成の仕方を見ていきましょう。

 

権限エンティティの作成

データアクセス制御を作成する前に、以下の列を含む権限エンティティを準備しておく必要があります。

  • 権限 ID 列 - キーとしてマークされている必要があります。
  • ユーザ ID 列 - アイデンティティプロバイダから求められた書式でユーザ ID が格納されています (電子メールアドレス、ログオン名、その他の ID など)。
  • 制限列 - ユーザごとの各制限は一意の名前を持つ必要があり、1 つ以上の基準が各制限に属することができます。制限に属するすべての基準が AND 条件として動作します。ユーザごとに複数の制限がある場合は、すべての制限が OR 条件として動作します。
  • 基準列 - 基準名には英数字とアンダースコアのみを使用でき、ユーザがデータアクセス制御をビューに適用すると、マッピング領域に基準名が表示されます。基準名は、列名と正確に一致する必要はありませんが、マッピング先の列にユーザを誘導する必要があります。
  • 演算子の列 - 以下の演算子がサポートされています。
    • ALL (または *) - すべてのレコードにアクセスできるようにする。値は不要。
    • N (または IS NULL) - Null。値は不要。
    • NN (または NOT NULL) - Null ではない。値は不要。
    • EQ (または = ) - 最初の値に等しい。
    • NE (または <> または !=) - 最初の値に等しくない。
    • GT (または >) - 最初の値より大きい。
    • GE (または >=) - 最初の値以上。
    • LT (または <) - 最初の値より小さい。
    • LE (または <=) - 最初の値以下。
    • CP (または LIKE) - 最初の値パターンを含む。必要に応じて、2 番目の値をエスケープ文字に設定できます。
    • BT (または BETWEEN) - 最初の値と 2 番目の値の間。
  • 最初の値列 - この値は、演算子の最初の引数または下限として動作します。
  • 2 番目の値列 - この値は、演算子の 2 番目の引数または上限として動作します。

この権限エンティティに登録したレコードがデータアクセス制御の内容となります。
以下は権限エンティティのサンプルです。

権限エンティティ例

権限IDユーザID制限基準演算子最初の値2番目の値
1hiroki.ito@sap.com0FISCYEARBT 2022 2023
2hiroki.ito@sap.com0COUNTRYNAMEEQJapan 
3hiroki.ito@sap.com1FISCYEARBT20222023
4hiroki.ito@sap.com1REGIONNAMEEQNorth America 
5hiroki.ito@sap.com2FISCYEARGE2024 
6hiroki.ito@sap.com2CUSTOMERCPSport% 
7xxxxxx.yyyyyy@zzzzzz.com0CUSTOMERIDAll  
       

上記の権限エンティティレコードによって、ユーザID: hiroki.ito@sap.comには以下のようなデータアクセス制御がなされます。

  1. 制限0により、会計年度2022年から2023年までのJapanのデータを参照できます
  2. 制限1により、会計年度2022年から2023年までのNorth America地域のデータを参照できます
  3. 制限2により、会計年度2024年以降の"Sport"で始まる顧客名称のデータを参照できます。

また、ユーザID: xxxxxx.yyyyyy@zzzzzz.com は特権ユーザとしてすべてのデータを参照できます。
このように、AND条件であれば同一制限のレコードを登録し、OR条件であれば複数制限のレコードを登録することで動作させることができます。

CSVファイルで上記のようなレコードを作成したら、サイドナビゲーション領域でデータビルダをクリックし、CSVファイルをインポートして権限エンティティを作成することも可能です。

これで権限エンティティが作成できました。

 

データアクセス制御の作成

続いてデータアクセス制御を作成します。
サイドナビゲーション領域で、データアクセス制御をクリックしてから必要に応じてスペースを選択し、新規データアクセス制御をクリックしてエディタを開きます。

次に、一般セクションのプロパティを入力します。この時、構造は「演算子と値」を選択します。権限エンティティには、上記で作成した権限エンティティを選択します。また、ユーザ列にはユーザ ID が格納された列（多くの場メールアドレスの列）を選択します。

続いて基準セクションも入力します。
制限列、基準列、演算子の列、最初の値列、２番目の値列に権限エンティティで作成した列をそれぞれ選択します。

利用可能な基準すべてにチェックが入っていることを確認し、保存→デプロイします。

これでデータアクセス制御が作成できました。

 

データアクセス制御の設定

いよいよビューに対して作成したデータアクセス制御を設定します。
今回は事前に作成した顧客マスタディメンションビューを使用します。このビューには、2022年から2024年までの様々な地域や国の顧客情報が登録されています。作成したデータアクセス制御を設定し、参照可能なデータに制限をかけます。現時点では、データビューアではすべてのデータが閲覧できる状態です。

まず、ビューを選択した状態で右上の詳細ボタンからModelプロパティを開き、スクロールダウンしてデータアクセス制御の領域で+ボタンを押下してデータアクセス制御を設定します。

ポップアップウインドウで作成したデータアクセス制御を選択しOKをクリックします。

Modelプロパティの結合セクションで、ビューの列をデータアクセス制御で定義された基準列にマッピングします。マッピングが完了したらビューを保存してデプロイします。
データビューアをクリックするとデータアクセス制御の設定に従って参照できるデータがフィルタリングされていることが確認できます。

これでデータアクセス制御が有効になりました。

 

おわりに

このように、SAP Datasphere では、"演算子と値"を用いた複雑なデータアクセス制御を作成することができ、きめ細やかな管理をすることが可能です。また、対象者の権限に変更があった場合も権限エンティティの内容を変更することでタイムリーにアクセス制御に反映することができます。必要に応じてこちらの機能をご活用ください。

entry.title: Re: Sap CPQ: Add to Quote Button for Configurable Products.
entry.content:
when your in product configuration, Add to quote or Update to quote is shown when you have selected particular Product and you can stay on the same page to select another product for configuration. 

Either you can use bulk Items to add to the quote which you can think of this solution.

entry.title: Re: What is the stable process for changes to freehandsql...
entry.content:
... instead of using "select * from" you have to work with the exact fieldnames, so FHSQL can recognize that something has changed

... and btw.  it is never recommended to use "*" in the final/productive SQL-statement

entry.title: Re: Project System service POs partial closed
entry.content: I think you mean it is a purchase order created from a PR originated in Project. You can lock the PO line item in case of service PO.

entry.title: Re: purchaser name
entry.content: i don't know about S4 but in ECC6 requisitioner is an input field in PR. it is not filled from any tables

entry.title: Re: Project System service POs partial closed
entry.content: service po is not editable as release strategy implemented and we to close service PO not lock it.

entry.title: Re: Clock In Clock Out in SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking – Overview and How-To Guide
entry.content:
Hello,

We have a requirement where multiple time types related to Attendance (P10) are received from terminal like regular time, overtime, travel duty time. All need to be associated with P10 but in the time derivation configuration only one time type can be associated with P10. How can this requirement be met? Can we have multiple time types associated with one Time event type say P10?

entry.title: Nomina
entry.content: Se requieren recibos de pago. ¿A quién preguntar?

entry.title: What is the minimum system requirements for auto log of critical events in security audit log
entry.content:
Hi,

since a while SAL always logs very critical events if SAL is activated no matter how the filters are configured. This is described in note 539404.

This note refers to all SAP versions prior to 750. But I guess that auto logging of very critical events was not always active. So I asked myself, what is the minimum requirement (level) for that feature?

 

KR

entry.title: Re: February Developer Challenge - CAP Plugins: Week 2
entry.content: You need to write a query before executing. From your other post it looks like you got it. But if if still having problems, let us know.

entry.title: Re: Hosting SAP CodeJam event in Poznan, Poland
entry.content: I've recorded your request and an expert will be in touch to discuss logistics details.

entry.title: Satistical object cost collector is sap public cloud
entry.content:
Dear all

we are currently implementing S/4HANA cloud public edition.

WBS (PS) is the main Cost/Revenue object used in the designed solution. But our client needs also to track the costs of construction machinery used in the sites.

So we need to allocate the costs to WBS as a true object and additionnaly to a statistical object : it used to be the statistical internal order in S/4.

As mentionned in Note 2724606, internal order functionality is no more supported :

The request is : What statistical object can be associated to WBS ?

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Analyzing HEX query performance
entry.content:
Hello,

What does the (new hidden) hint "HEX_DISK" exactly do 🙂 ?

entry.title: Re: Error on from learning exercise : SAP Business Applic...
entry.content: The issue can be mismatch of password. During the creation of user - UPS_GRANTOR the password in the example is "Password1" . In order to edit the password later open the .env file in the Project directory and find the tag "user-provided" . Inside that go and update the password. Hope this solves the issue.

entry.title: Re: purchase responcible
entry.content: Assign necessary roles and authorizations to this user for creating purchase requests and purchase orders.

entry.title: SAP Cloud Integration: Streamlining Update Alerts for SAP Prepackaged Content/Adapter
entry.content:
In the realm of SAP Cloud Integration, the widespread adoption of prepackaged content is evident across diverse organizations. These ready-to-use solutions undergo regular updates to improve functionality and address evolving needs. However, ensuring timely updates in such varied environments can be challenging without a proactive approach. Adding to the complexity, SAP's lack of notification alerts exacerbates the issue, requiring operations teams to manually monitor the design tab for updates. This manual process leaves room for oversight, potentially delaying critical updates and causing operational disruptions.

To address this challenge and streamline operations, I have developed an iflow solution. This iflow automates the process of checking for updates in the design tab, eliminating the need for constant manual monitoring by the operations team. Upon detecting any available updates, the iflow promptly triggers an email notification to the team, alerting them to take action. By automating this process, the iflow ensures that updates are promptly identified and applied, minimizing the risk of operational issues due to outdated content.

This proactive approach not only simplifies the workflow for the operations team but also ensures that updates are implemented in a timely manner, enhancing the overall efficiency and reliability of SAP Cloud Integration environments.

Scenario : There is update available for the Prepackaged content "SAP Cloud for Customer Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud", This update is indicated by a conspicuous green label labeled "Update Available," prominently highlighted for attention.

Solution- Iflow Design:

In my approach i will make use of predefined SAP Cloud Integration API "IntegrationPackages" to fetch the details related to Integration Packages, Please find the iflow design in the image below.

                                                                                             IFlow Design

Components Breakdown:

1. Set Properties - This content modifier is used to set few properties related to email notifications.

2. Process Call - Request reply with HTTP adapter is used to initiate a GET call to IntegrationPackages API

URL: {{Your Tenant Address}}/api/v1/IntegrationPackages

Authentication - Basic/OAuth

Response from IntegrationPackages API:

A crucial field labeled <UpdateAvailable> has surfaced with a value of "true" for the "SAP Cloud for Customer Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud" package. This indicates the presence of an available update for this specific package. In contrast, other packages not necessitating updates are marked with a value of "false" in the same field.

The idea is utilize this field to filter out the packages for which the updates are available

 XML CleanUp Groovy : The response comes with XML namespace, this script is used to remove the namespace from the response and have a clean and plain XML at the output.

Filter : Filter component is used to filter out the nodes with below XPATH condition, Vendor = 'SAP' is populated for all the prepackaged content provided by SAP

 XPATH condition : /feed/entry/properties[Vendor='SAP' and UpdateAvailable='true']

 

Frame XML - This content modifier is used to frame the XML again because the XML header gets vanished from the previous Filter operation.

Router : If updates are found (Nodes filtered from Filter step), it directs the flow to a route responsible for sending an alert containing the list of packages requiring updates. Conversely, if no updates are detected (Empty output from filter step), it channels the flow to another route designed to send an alert stating that no updates are currently available.

Condition:

XSLT Mapping: Now, with the list of packages requiring updates in hand, it's essential to distinguish between two types:

1. Integration Packages

2. Adapter Packages.

I've implemented XSLT mapping. This mapping specifically checks the <Mode> field, where the value 'READ_ONLY' uniquely identifies Adapter packages. By segregating the packages accordingly, we can ensure that the alert email clearly presents each type for easier comprehension and effective response.

 

 

 

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
  <xsl:output method="html" indent="yes"/>

  <!-- Match the root element -->
  <xsl:template match="/">
    <html>
      <head>
        <style>
          table {
            border-collapse: collapse;
            width: 100%;
          }
          th, td {
            border: 1px solid black;
            padding: 8px;
            text-align: left;
          }
          th {
            background-color: #f2f2f2;
          }
        </style>
      </head>
      <body>
        <table>
          <tr>
            <th>Package Name</th>
            <th>Package Type</th>
            <th>Current Version</th>
          </tr>
          <!-- Apply template to process each properties node -->
          <xsl:apply-templates select="//properties"/>
        </table>
      </body>
    </html>
  </xsl:template>

  <!-- Template to process each properties node -->
  <xsl:template match="properties">
    <tr>
      <!-- Get the value of Name -->
      <td><xsl:value-of select="Name"/></td>
      <td>
              <xsl:choose>
          <!-- If Mode is "Read_Only", output "Adapter"; if not, output "Integration Flow" -->
          <xsl:when test="Mode = 'READ_ONLY'">Integration Adapter Package</xsl:when>
          <xsl:otherwise>Integration Package</xsl:otherwise>
        </xsl:choose>
        </td>
      <!-- Get the value of Version -->
      <td><xsl:value-of select="Version"/></td>
    </tr>
  </xsl:template>
</xsl:stylesheet>

 

 

 

 That's it for now. We'll transfer this data to the email body using Groovy. Once we've completed the cosmetic enhancements and beautification of the email, our alert will be ready for dispatch. I won't delve into the email Groovy code in this blog since I've already covered it comprehensively in a previous post. You can refer to that blog (link below) to ensure your email alerts are not only functional but also visually appealing and user-friendly.

SAP Cloud Integration - Make your Alert Email look simple and beautiful 

Email Notification : You can many fields from the response in your email alert, I have also added current version column for more information.

 

 

Updates Available:

No Updates Available:

This proactive approach not only simplifies the workflow for the operations team but also ensures that updates are implemented in a timely manner, enhancing the overall efficiency and reliability of SAP Cloud Integration environments.

I hope this helps.

Cheers, 
Punith

entry.title: how to remove priority check of promotions in cart?
entry.content: If a product has more than one promotion on top of it, only the promotion with higher priority will be applied in the cart. There is a requirement to apply all different promotions of the same product for which they cart is qualified for.

entry.title: Re: Analysis for Office query speed for CDS view?
entry.content:
Hi,

At CDS level you can create Prompts , this will improve the performance.

Refer this

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-add-value-help-for-parameter-in-abap-cds-analytical-query/ba-p/13377436

entry.title: How to patch a journal entry adding more lines using the service layer?
entry.content:
I'm trying to patch an existing journal entry, created automatically from a "Goods Issue" (InventoryGenExit), which has two lines which I need to edit and add two more lines, using the service layer, but it always return a "-5002 - Invalid number of rows" error message. 

I've tried to set the Line_ID and the DocumentLine incrementally on each line or leave them as null, always getting the same error. The error is not returned if no new lines are added.

SAP Business One, version for SAP HANA

entry.title: Unable To Activate The New Asset Valuation View in Set Of Books
entry.content:
Hello,
we want to activate an additional valuation view in a company where assets already exist.
Despite recognizing that the standard system behavior typically doesn't accommodate our needs, given the substantial number of assets within OVT , we find ourselves in a dire situation. We need to explore alternative solutions beyond initiating a new migration with a new set of books.
Could you please investigate if there are any viable options available to address our current challenge?

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Unable To Activate The New Asset Valuation View in Se...
entry.content:
Dear All,

In this scenario, I suggest you to review the KBA 2613077 Unable To Activate The New Asset Valuation View in Set Of Books (https://me.sap.com/notes/2613077) that explains the system behavior.

Thank you.

Regards.
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: The Future is Now: Reflections on SAP Data Unleashed 2024
entry.content:
I find that the Kano model, from management engineering lessons, can fit exactly to summarize the situation:

Excitement Factors: (gives huge satisfaction if met and low dissatisfaction if not met) 

Example: Gen AI, automatic planning (basically what we saw in the presentation)

=> they are not available yet (so this do not satisfy me as I can not judge it now).

Performance Factors: (linear performance of satisfaction / accuracy plane)

Example: half of year 2023 we had problems and not predictable performances with HEX engine (the new hana cloud engine) that fallbacks to other old engines randomly.

=> I am not satisfied as I invest my time in platform issues that were out of my control as the platform is self managed by the application.

Basic Factors: (if met they do not increase the satisfaction, but if not met they increase a lot the dissatisfaction)

Examples

- we still can not aggregate string type columns, I can not apply a basic MAX() function to a string in graphical editors => the missing of a basic factor lead to huge dissatisfaction.

- last update "you can add the connections as a dependancies to packages" => in reality what I experience was "you must add the connections => your packages are all broken => you can not change and deploy any object ultill you fix the dependancies => you can not add the connections as they are not visible objects you must add a remote table so connections will be added as dependancies => you must be aware not to import the connections in PRD otherwise you possibly broke the existing connections". (2 hours of taking notice of this and 4 to repair manually dependancies in every system).

- Replication Flows: after a year I can not understand how to configure S/4HANA to make it work as source. In addition the difficulty of configuration we had this beautiful note that say: "probably the data you extracted so far in delta mode is corrupted".

https://me.sap.com/notes/3431218

=> Im satisfied not to use replication flow in this case.

Best Regards and good weekend,

entry.title: Use of Price Per Unit in Material Master & PO
entry.content:
Hi All

We want to use 3 or 4 digits after decimals in procurement. 

Below are the options-

a) OY04- Change of number of digits after decimals to 3 or 4 in OY04. We won't use it as we are already live & don't want to mess data of other company codes too.

b) Price Per Unit- I m not getting how this can be useful. For example-If my materials actual cost is 111.891. I maintain price as 1118.91 per 10 price per unit & not round up to 111.89 per 1 unit. It will still show net amount & condition value as 111.89 which will be same in accounting too then what is use of price per unit? What is workaround/solution for these kind of issues in PO, GR & invoicing? Pls advice.

Regards

Pankaj

entry.title: Re: Pricing with higher decimal places
entry.content:
Hi 

Is this solution only for print output?

Regards

Pankaj

entry.title: Re: Fund Management issue
entry.content:
Hi,

You can consult this OSS note:

2728946 - Consistency Check between MM and PSM - FMDERIVE

This error comes due to inconsistency between the document FM account assignment, and derivation applied in your FMDERIVE rules. You can eventually deactivate this error (FICUSTOM404) in OBA5, but you have to be aware of the consequences and accept possible, maybe desired, side effects.

Regards,

Eli

entry.title: C_HANATEC_19 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS07
entry.content:
Hello ,

I've noticed today that the "C_HANATEC_19 - SAP Certified Technology Associate - SAP HANA 2.0 SPS07" certification exam is retiring soon ( 28/03/2024). Please could you explain what does this mean. Also , do we have to wait until 2025 to take the new exam that will replace that one? Is the Learning Content on the Learning Journey still updated to cover this subject ?

Thank you in advance for your help.

Have a great day

entry.title: Re: The General ledge balance and funds management commit...
entry.content:
Hi,

Aligning FI and FM is not an easy thing. Though, in theory, the two worlds can be aligned, in reality, this is always tricky. Of course, I speak only of cases, where you can full alignment between G/L and CI, and all FI postings have FM document, which is rarely the case. Posting directly in FM could be ensured either by forcing different FM account assignment in FI posting with zero impact on G/L (will required deviation from your FMDERIVE rules) or by a direct FM document, e.g. Funds Transfer, if you have it configured in the system.

Regards,

Eli

entry.title: Re: 🇨🇭 Getting Started with Machine Learning using SAP HANA (Zurich, CH)
entry.content:
Hey Vitaliy, 

I'm the 27th 🤕 and now what will happen? Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Additional SAP Community feeds 📡
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing! I've been using Brief Firefox add-on before because it's very simple and easy to use. But, unfortunately, it does not recognize these links as RSS feeds. Thanks to suggestion from @richardfahey  here, I got that other add-on that allows to search for feeds on demand. (Brief just shows a subscribe button when it finds the feed, I didn't find an option to add a URL manually.) So if anyone has the same issue with their favorite RSS reader, then you will need to find a different one.

I have to say though that it's still mind-boggling that SAP Community team who's been so long on the job saw this platform and was like "this is fine". Ugh.

entry.title: Do you know how to find the IDOC number of a vendor invoice?
entry.content:
On some occasions to analyze an invoice it was necessary to find out the IDOC number responsible for posting this document.

In cases where you do not know the source of the IDOC there are two alternatives to find out this document, in which I will present in the sequence either via MIR4 or via database access.

1) MIR4.

First, ensure that your user has authorization to dialog process. To change this attribute, see more details in KBA 3294556 .

When opening an invoice in display mode, access the menu Relantionship using GOS button - it is the icon in the top left of the screen named "Services for Object"

 

It will bring a pop-up with the IDOC number linked to the invoice document.

2) SRRELROLES table.

Due to security rules, sometimes it is not possible to change users or its access the GOS menu in MIRO.

Therefore, if you have authorization to display tables, you can perform the steps below:

#1. When accessing transaction SE16, search for table SRRELROLES and enter the data

OBJKEY: invoice number no+fiscal year
OBJTYPE: BUS2081

E.g:
OBJKEY               OBJTYPE   ROLETYPE    UTCTIME
51065227262023 BUS2081   INBELEG       20,240,214,230.034

#2. COPY the UTCTIME valu

#3. Enter it in a new search by:

OBJTYPE: IDOC
ROLETYPE: INIDOC
UTCTIME: copied from the previous step

E.g:
OBJKEY                 OBJTYPE ROLETYPE UTCTIME
0000000061722349 IDOC     INIDOC       20,240,214,230.034
0000000061776014 IDOC     INIDOC       20,240,214,230.034

 

#4. Search on the BD87 the IDOC by OBJKEY number found in the step 3 to find which was with status 53 created the invoice

 

I hope this blog helps you find the EDI number to troubleshoot your scenario easily.

You are welcome to post any questions / feedback you may have in the comments section.
 

See you in the next post.
Ana Hilgert

entry.title: Delta (derived) Depreciation area in S4 HANA
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Expecting your help on the below Asset Accounting scenario as many of you might have done this ECC to S4 HANA conversion project.

In ECC we have:

DA 01 Book Depreciation, as per US GAAP

DA 02 Book Depreciation, as per Local GAAP  

DA 03 Delta Dep (Diff between US and Local gap) (02 minus 01)

In S4 HANA how to configure the above. DA 01 will be converted as it is, this is ok.

But how to handle DAs 02 and 03. Do I need to change settings in OADB and A090 also.

Please help me here with details. Thank you so much.

entry.title: Correlation ID: 20586580-6415-4536-a211-718304940235
entry.content:
Hello,
My name is Aruna, I am doing self training on the SAP SAP Analytics Cloud and trying to get acquainted and knowledgeable in this area. I have signed up for accessing the free trial of the software - SAP Analytics Cloud Guided Experience.

I have tried to create some charts and trying to add some code in the Tab but I keep getting the enclosed errors, earlier I didn't see these errors.

Script execution failed for event "Chart_1.onSelect"
Correlation ID: 20586580-6415-4536-a211-718304940235

Script execution failed for event "Chart_1.onSelect"
Correlation ID: 25622283-9835-4271-8884-332427037913

It will be very kind of you to resolve my issues so I can continue with my learning path.
Thank You,
Aruna Vanukuru

  "type": "sap.s4.beh.allergen.v1.Allergen.Created.v1",
  "specversion": "1.0",
  "source": "../dictionary",
  "subject": "string",
  "id": "QgEK7wzuHtqdhJwqCS+VOA==",
  "time": "2018-04-05T17:31:00Z",
  "datacontenttype": "application/json",
  "data": {
    "AllergenInternalID": "string"
  }
}

entry.title: Ensuring Business Compliance: Efficient Handling of Legal Certificates of your Business Partners
entry.content:
Business Partners in certain countries or regions must have registration certificates issued by the legal authorities to conduct business. These certificates have a specific validity period and need to be renewed periodically.

Business Partner Certificates Localization solution allows you to manage the legal and business certificate information related to your business partners. This information can then be used to fulfill the legal requirements for various business processes in a country. With the business partner certificates function, you can configure the certificates necessary for your country or region, keep track of the certificate validity to manage your business transactions with your partner and take the required actions, such as handling invoices and making payments.

 Start video

As a business configuration expert user, you can activate business partner certificates for a specific country with the BP roles of FI supplier and FI customer to manage configuration activities and make changes as necessary.

  • Different types of certificates can be defined for business partners across all countries.

  • Certificate IDs can then be assigned to the country/region and their properties, such as mandatory status, attachment requirement, and default validity.

  • If a Certificate ID is mandatory for a country/region, the system will display an error or warning message when trying to save or edit the business partners master data.

  • Specify whether an attachment is mandatory for certificate creation for a specific country or region.

  • You can use Validity Period to specify the default time duration for the certificate, and this value is used to calculate the certificate's validity end date automatically.

As a business user, you can manage certificate information for the business partners created as FI Supplier and FI Customer roles. The new Certificates tab is available in the Maintain Business Partner app when creating or editing a business partner.

  • Maintain certificates that are mandatory for the country/region of the company code assigned to the business partner and

  • Add an attachment(s) for certificates that require an attachment, and use the 'attachment icon' to display an attachment if the certificate has it.

  • Specify the main certificate for each combination of country/region and certificate ID, and

The system validates the certificates details against configurations and saves the details if all requirements are met. Otherwise, it displays an error or warning message and does not save your changes until you resolve the errors

  • You should not maintain certificates with overlapping validities for the same country/region, certificate ID, and region.

  • For multiple business partners, do not maintain the same certificate (having the same country/region, certificate ID, number, and valid from date).

In addition to managing certificates for business partners, you can also utilize features such as exemption, extension, renewal, deletion, and restoration.

  • To exempt a business partner from a mandatory certificate validations, you should maintain the exemption reason. Once added, the exemption details will be displayed in the business partner master data and can be used in various business processes but can not be used in the validation process *.

  • To ensure that a business partner's certificate remains valid and up-to-date, there are two ways to extend or renew its validity. You can update "Valid To" date for an active or exempted certificate to a future date, or create a copy of an active certificate that has a validity starting after the validity of the original certificate.

  • If you have a certificate that is no longer required, you can delete it. Once you delete the certificate, it will not be displayed in the business partner master data and will not be used anymore. However, if you want to view the deleted certificates, you can use the "Show Deleted" checkbox to display them at any time. You can also restore a deleted certificate and use it again for the business partner.

In conclusion, the Business Partner Certificates Localization solution is a useful feature for customers to manage legal and business certificate information related to their business partners. By following the steps outlined in the article, customers can configure the certificates necessary for their country or region, maintain the certificate information related to their business partners, keep track of the certificate validity, and take the required actions to manage their system transactions with their business partners. Overall, this solution can help SAP customers comply with legal requirements, improve their business processes, and build stronger partnerships with their suppliers and customers.

(*) please note that the feature of the validation process is planned for future development in the roadmap of the Business Partner Certificates Localization solution.

entry.title: Re: A day in the life of Mike, a Shop Floor Worker using SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content: Excellent post, thanks for sharing Manoel!

entry.title: Re: Fiori Elements - List Report: Boolean as Icon
entry.content: Hello Senqi, many thanks for your input. Could you please tell me, with which information should I replace "ZDemoSet" and "demonamespace" in the extension block in manifest.json?

entry.title: 15days period valuation
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

How do I configure a time valuation for a 15days period. I have a requirement to get OT after 176Hours is recorded. Employees work 12HRs for 15days which totals to 180, 176 is considered regular time and 4 hours overtime. If an employee takes vacation within the 15days then they are not entitled to the 4hrs Overtime.

The time recording period in SuccessFactors can only be one week. Does any one know how I can achieve this requirement.
Thanks

@Volker_Ruof 
@Timo 
SAP SuccessFactors Time Tracking

entry.title: Re: Authorization issue with Oauth2 Client Credentials in...
entry.content: Hi, I also have the issue, but as PJanik said, the reason is that Credential Name in Connector and Security Material is not the same.

entry.title: How should SAP embrace SAP AI?
entry.content:
I would like to express my sincere gratitude for considering my inquiry.

SAP has made significant investments in the field of artificial intelligence, and I have been fascinated by   AI  JOULE. I am impressed with the concept of end users being able to operate and configure the SAP system through natural language. Moreover, SAP Business AI appears to provide users with valuable implementation recommendations, based on the analysis of business data. This integration of AI into the SAP system enables users to interact with it in a more intuitive and efficient manner, thereby enhancing the overall user experience.

However, as I embark on my journey as a new SAP consultant,  I am curious to know to

1) What extent AI will challenge the role of SAP consultants in the future?  How far is the future?

2) Given this rapid technological shift, I am also wondering what steps a new SAP consultant should take to embrace this change and stay ahead of the curve. What knowledge or skills should we acquire to face the challenges posed by artificial intelligence?

3) In this era of SAP AI,  what is the most effective and efficient way to learn SAP?

Your guidance and expertise in this matter would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you once again for considering my questions, and I look forward to your responses.

entry.title: Eclipse GitHub Repositiry 421 error
entry.content:
I have created a package in Eclipse for ABAP RAP. I am trying to upload them in the github. While linking the repostory, I get HTTP 421 error. 

 

Can someone help me with this?

HTTP error 421 occured: SSL handshake with github.com:443 failed: SSSLERR_PEER_CERT_UNTRUSTED (-102)
Peer's X.509 certificate (chain) validation failed (missing

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear David,

My name is Tra, I have been working in ABAP for more than 1 year.

My motivation for reaching out to you is to enhance my expertise in the SAP domain. I am eager to expand my knowledge base, and, most importantly, I aspire to unlock new career opportunities. The thought of remaining stagnant in my current position day after day is something I'm determined to avoid. I yearn to propel my career as far as it can go, and obtaining a SAP certification would be a pivotal step toward achieving that goal.

I genuinely appreciate your thoughtful initiative, and I'm eagerly anticipating your response.

Thank you

Tra

entry.title: MDG-F : No valid target content area found
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I'm getting the error shown below on the MDG UI screen. This happens when I open a new create change request for Financial Accounting Governance. Click New and select
G/L Account Centrally, the same problem occurs when creating a cost center.

Link Log. Actions with UI Application and Bus. Act.: Standard Definition is configured normally.

 

What could be the cause of this error?

How can I solve this problem?

entry.title: Re: Change Material in Sales Order Line Item Using BAPI_SALESORDER_CHANGE
entry.content: So , if i make MATNR Field editable in va02 through user exit enhancement , will i be able to change through bapi a well ? Please reply

entry.title: Re: Project System service POs partial closed
entry.content: it is not possible to close a service PO with a delivery completed indicator . you can only lock or delete the line to remove any commitment that may still exist on the PO. You may try thru MEMASSPO txn

entry.title: Re: ADD ON for ERP 6 SAP ERP 6.0
entry.content:
Hi Dharshan,

Have you referred to the SAP note 2500033 as mentioned in the error message with all details.

Regards

SS

entry.title: Re: MMPV_DATE_CHECK: Error occurred (Note 1082841).
entry.content:
what is the posting date maintained for the goods receipt?

in MMPV you are trying to open period 4 which i think is April. System prevents opening future period if the date difference between system date and the 1st day of the new period is more than 10 days. which means period 4 ( april) can only be opened after 20th March. I think your real issue is the posting date maintained in MIGO
